p.strong: Critical Invariant: Buffer MUST NOT be reused until notification CQE arrives

div.p: Critical Timing Window: Between Completion CQE and Notification CQE, the buffer is still being read by the NIC hardware via DMA.
SQE Submit ──► Completion CQE ──► Notification CQE ──► Buffer Safe │ │ │ │ │ └── IORING_CQE_F_NOTIF=1 │ └── IORING_CQE_F_NOTIF=0 └── Buffer locked by kernel
[ DMA TRANSFER WINDOW: Buffer is immutable ]

li.strong: Buffer STILL in use by DMA
